title: Greed in the Sun
writer: Michel Audiard, Claude Veillot, Henri Verneuil
actors: Jean-Paul Belmondo, Lino Ventura, Reginald Kernan
plot: A rough trucker assigns his new truck and its mysterious cargo to his newest employee, only to see it hijacked by one of his experienced drivers. Now, his friends are after him to retrieve the goods. Are 100,000 dollars worth dyin...
